scripts.test:unit: rm -rf .tmp/unit && tsc --ignoreConfig --target ES2020 --module Node16 --moduleResolution node16 --types node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp/unit --rootDir . --noEmit false tests/unit/targetAlgorithm.test.ts tests/unit/openRouterModels.test.ts src/lib/food/targetAlgorithm.ts src/lib/food/pendingFoodDeletes.ts src/lib/food/analyze/openRouterModels.ts src/lib/nutrition/waterEntryTime.ts src/lib/nutrition/nutritionTargetsCache.ts src/lib/supabase/syncOutboxQueue.ts src/types/nutritionTargets.ts && node .tmp/unit/tests/unit/targetAlgorithm.test.js && node .tmp/unit/tests/unit/openRouterModels.test.js; status=$?; rm -rf .tmp/unit .tmp; exit $status
